case_title: DOMUS & DOMUS, FORMERLY DOMUS DESIGN GROUP, A VS. SWINERTON BUILDERS et al

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302, NOTICE OF AMENDED PETITION FOR CONFIRMATION OF ARBITRATION CONTINUED FROM JUN-03-2010 TO LAW AND MOTION AT JUN-04-2010, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 PER AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES.

RESPONSE TO AMENDED PETITION FOR CONFIRMATION OF ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY RESPONDENT SWINERTON BUILDERS AS TO PETITIONER DOMUS & DOMUS, FORMERLY DOMUS DESIGN GROUP, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER DOMUS & DOMUS, FORMERLY DOMUS DESIGN GROUP, AMENDED PETITION FOR CONFIRMATION OF ARBITRATION AWARD. HEARING HELD AND ARGUED, AND THE MATTER IS CONTINUED FROM JUN-04-2010 TO JUN-14-2010. FOR THE COURT'S PURPOSES, 6/14/2010 WILL BE CONSIDERED AS THE DATE THAT THE MATTER IS SUBMITTED FOR DECISION. NO FURTHER APPEARANCES ARE REQUIRED. EACH SIDE TO PREPARE FINDINGS AND ORDER, AND TO SUBMIT TO THE COURT AND EACH OTHER BY 6/14/2010. COUNSEL MAY ADDRESS ISSUES OF SERVICE, AND ISSUE OF JUDGMENT DISCUSSED AT TODAY'S HEARING. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD; COURT REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

LAW AND MOTION, 302, PETITIONER DOMUS & DOMUS' AMENDED PETITION FOR CONFIRMATION OF ARBITRATION. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PROPOSED FINDINGS AND ORDER DUE. NO APPEARANCE REQUIRED. MATTER IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF TODAY'S DATE. SUBMITTED ON JUN-14-2010 BY JUDGE CHARLOTTE W. WOOLARD. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD; COURT REPORTER: BRENDA FIELDS, CSR# 7235

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Amended Petition For Confirmation Of Arbitration
Off Calendar Jun-25-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER DOMUS & DOMUS, FORMERLY DOMUS DESIGN GROUP, Amended Petition for Confirmation Of Arbitration. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Proposed findings and order due. No appearance required. Matter is taken under submission as of today's date. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Brenda Fields, CSR# 7235

Notice Of Amended Petition For Confirmation Of Arbitration
Off Calendar Jun-04-2010 Continued To Jun-14-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER DOMUS & DOMUS, FORMERLY DOMUS DESIGN GROUP, Amended Petition for Confirmation of Arbitration Award. Appearances: Quinlan S. Tom, Esq. McInerney & Dillon (510) 465-7100 appearing for Respondent Swinerton Builders, and opposing party. Ruling: Hearing held and argued, and the matter is continued to 6/14/2010. For the Court's purposes, 6/14/2010 will be considered as the date that the matter is submitted for decision. No further appearances are required. Each side to prepare findings and order, and to submit to the Court and each other by 6/14/2010. Counsel may address issues of service, and issue of judgment discussed at today's hearing. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
